---
title: "Transit Years 2"
author: "Viki Hristova"
date: "2026-03-07"
output: pdf_document
---

---
title: "transit_test"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-02-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=F, warning=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
require(naniar)
require(ggplot2)
require(stringi)
require(tidyr)
require(dplyr)
require(corrplot)
require(leaps)
```

## Getting the data

```{r}
# Getting the Data
transit_cost_2 <- read.csv("Transit_Costs.csv")
gdp_data <- read.csv("world-bank-gdp.csv")
country_code <- read.csv("country-code.csv")
urban <- read.csv("urban-pop.csv")
```

## Cleaning

```{r}
transit2 <- transit_cost_2[1:1007,c("Country", "City", "Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")]

cols <- c("Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year",  "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")

transit2$TunnelPer <- gsub("%", "", transit2$TunnelPer)
for(col in cols){
  transit2[,col] <- as.numeric(transit2[,col])
}

transit2$Years <- transit2$End.year - transit2$Start.year
transit2$real_cost <- transit2$Cost.km..2023.dollars. * transit2$Length
transit2$log_cost <- log(transit2$Cost.km..2023.dollars.)
transit2$log_real_cost <- log(transit2$real_cost)

transit2
```


## Continent

```{r}
transit2 <- transit2 %>%
  mutate(
    Continent = case_when(
      Country %in% c("US", "CA", "MX", "PA", "DR") ~ "North America",
      Country %in% c("BR", "AR", "CL", "CO", "PE", "EC") ~ "South America",
      Country %in% c("GB", "FR", "DE", "ES", "IT", "NL", "NO",
                     "SE", "DK", "FI", "AT", "BE", "BG",
                     "CZ", "GR", "HU", "CH", "RU", "UK", "PL", "PT", "RS", "RO", "UA") ~ "Europe",
      Country %in% c("CN", "JP", "KR", "IN", "HK", "ID",
                     "IL", "IR", "MY", "BD", "TH", "AE",
                     "BH", "KW", "PH", "PK", "QA", "SA", "SG", "TR", "TW", "VN") ~ "Asia",
      Country %in% c("AU", "NZ") ~ "Oceania",
      Country %in% c("EG", "ZA") ~ "Africa",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Continent = as.factor(Continent)
  )

transit2
```

## GDP

```{r}
code_map <- c(
  "AR" = "Argentina",
  "AT" = "Austria",
  "AU" = "Australia",
  "BD" = "Bangladesh",
  "BE" = "Belgium",
  "BG" = "Bulgaria",
  "BH" = "Bahrain",
  "BR" = "Brazil",
  "CA" = "Canada",
  "CH" = "Switzerland",
  "CL" = "Chile",
  "CN" = "China",
  "CO" = "Colombia",
  "CZ" = "Czechia",
  "DE" = "Germany",
  "DK" = "Denmark",
  "DR" = "Dominican Republic",
  "EC" = "Ecuador",
  "EG" = "Egypt, Arab Rep.",
  "ES" = "Spain",
  "FI" = "Finland",
  "FR" = "France",
  "GB" = "United Kingdom",
  "GR" = "Greece",
  "HK" = "Hong Kong SAR, China",
  "HU" = "Hungary",
  "ID" = "Indonesia",
  "IL" = "Israel",
  "IN" = "India",
  "IR" = "Iran, Islamic Rep.",
  "IT" = "Italy",
  "JP" = "Japan",
  "KR" = "Korea, Rep.",
  "KW" = "Kuwait",
  "MX" = "Mexico",
  "MY" = "Malaysia",
  "NL" = "Netherlands",
  "NO" = "Norway",
  "NZ" = "New Zealand",
  "PA" = "Panama",
  "PE" = "Peru",
  "PH" = "Philippines",
  "PK" = "Pakistan",
  "PL" = "Poland",
  "PT" = "Portugal",
  "QA" = "Qatar",
  "RO" = "Romania",
  "RS" = "Serbia",
  "RU" = "Russian Federation",
  "SA" = "Saudi Arabia",
  "SE" = "Sweden",
  "SG" = "Singapore",
  "TH" = "Thailand",
  "TR" = "Turkiye",
  "TW" = "Taiwan, China",
  "UA" = "Ukraine",
  "UK" = "United Kingdom",
  "US" = "United States",
  "UZ" = "Uzbekistan",
  "VN" = "Viet Nam",
  "ZA" = "South Africa"
)

get_wb_value <- function(df, transit_code, year) {
  if (is.na(transit_code) || is.na(year)) return(NA)
  
  year_col <- paste0("X", year)
  if (!(year_col %in% names(df))) return(NA)
  
  wb_name <- code_map[transit_code]
  if (is.na(wb_name)) return(NA)
  
  val <- df[df$Country.Name == wb_name, year_col]
  if (length(val) == 0) return(NA)
  
  as.numeric(val[1])
}

transit2$gdp <- mapply(
  function(ctry, yr) get_wb_value(gdp_data, ctry, yr),
  transit2$Country,
  transit2$Year
)

transit2$urban_pop <- mapply(
  function(ctry, yr) get_wb_value(urban, ctry, yr),
  transit2$Country,
  transit2$Year
)
```

### Removing NAs
```{r}
# for (yr in 1960:2025){
# transit2[transit2$Country=="RU"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Russian Federation", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="TR"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Turkiye", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="US"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="United States", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="KR"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Korea, Rep.", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="HK"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Hong Kong SAR, China", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="UK"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="United Kingdom", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="SA"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="South Africa", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# 
# transit2[transit2$Country=="TH"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Thailand", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
# }
# 
# cy <- transit2[is.na(transit2$gdp),c("Country", "Year")]
# cyg <- group_by(.data=cy, cy$Country) 
# s <- summarise(cyg,
#           n=n())
# s
# sum(s$n)
# 
# sum(is.na(transit2$gdp) & transit2$Year == 2025)
```

##Urban pop

```{r}
# code_to_urban <- function(code, year){
#   ifelse(!(year %in% 1960:2025),
#          NA,
#          urban[urban$CC==code, paste("X",year, sep="")])
# }
# 
# urban$CC <- sapply(urban$Country.Name, FUN=country_name_to_code)
# urban$CC <- as.character(urban$CC)
# 
# 
# urb <- c()
# for(i in 1:nrow(transit2)){
#   row <- transit2[i,c("Country","Year")]
#   urb <- c(urb, code_to_urban(row[[1]],row[[2]]))
# }
# transit2$urban_pop <- urb

```

## Histogram and missing values plot
```{r}
par(mfrow = c(3, 3))

hist(transit2$real_cost,
     main = "Real Cost",
     xlab = "real_cost")

hist(transit2$log_real_cost,
     main = "Log Real Cost",
     xlab = "log_real_cost")

hist(transit2$Cost.km..2023.dollars.,
     main = "Cost per km",
     xlab = "Cost per km")

hist(transit2$log_cost,
     main = "Log Cost per km",
     xlab = "log_cost")

hist(transit2$Years,
     main = "Years",
     xlab = "Years")

hist(transit2$Stations,
     main = "Stations",
     xlab = "Stations")

hist(transit2$Length,
     main = "Length",
     xlab = "Length")

hist(transit2$Tunnel,
     main = "Tunnel",
     xlab = "Tunnel")

hist(transit2$gdp,
     main = "GDP",
     xlab = "gdp")


#missing values 
gg_miss_var(transit2)
```

## Removing NAs from Years
```{r}
# Number of total observations
count <- length(transit2$Years)
count

# Number of NA
# Note in report that observations are lost because of missing values for start or end year so project year length can't be calculated
na_count <- sum(is.na(transit2$Years))
na_count

# Imputation:
transit2_imp <- transit2 %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(
    End.year = ifelse(is.na(End.year),
                      ifelse(!is.na(Start.year),
                        round(Start.year + mean(Years, na.rm = TRUE)),
                        # Account for if there is no Start year, using Year instead. 45 entries do not have any start or end years
                        round(Year + 0.5 * mean(Years, na.rm = TRUE))
                        ),
                      End.year),
    # 86 NAs after End.year imputation, 45 after Start.year imputation
    Start.year = ifelse(is.na(Start.year),
                      ifelse(!is.na(End.year),
                        round(End.year - mean(Years, na.rm = TRUE)),
                        # Account for if there is no Start year, using Year instead. 45 entries do not have any start or end years
                        round(Year - 0.5 * mean(Years, na.rm = TRUE))
                        ),
                      Start.year)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

transit2_imp$Years <- transit2_imp$End.year - transit2_imp$Start.year

na_count_imp <- sum(is.na(transit2_imp$Years))
na_count_imp

# Account for Elevated, Atgrade, and Platform Length NAs
# Setting as zero
transit2_imp$Elevated[is.na(transit2_imp$Elevated)] <- 0
transit2_imp$Atgrade[is.na(transit2_imp$Atgrade)] <- 0
transit2_imp$Platform.Length...Meters.[is.na(transit2_imp$Platform.Length...Meters.)] <- 0

# Not keeping location because focusing on project type on project time length 
# or years to avoid similarity from years when choosing model
keep <- c("RR.", "Length", "Tunnel", "TunnelPer", "Stations", "log_cost", "log_real_cost", "Year", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.", "Years", "real_cost", "gdp", "urban_pop", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Platform.Length...Meters.")

df_clean <- na.omit(transit2_imp[keep])


# Table without imputation and years NAs
transit_years_removed <- transit2[!is.na(transit2$Years),]

# Accounting for NAs
transit_years_removed$Elevated[is.na(transit_years_removed$Elevated)] <- 0
transit_years_removed$Atgrade[is.na(transit_years_removed$Atgrade)] <- 0
transit_years_removed$Platform.Length...Meters.[is.na(transit_years_removed$Platform.Length...Meters.)] <- 0

# Stations vs Year Length
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(transit_years_removed$Stations, transit_years_removed$Years)
plot(transit2_imp$Stations, transit2_imp$Years)

# Tunnel Percent vs Year Length
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(transit_years_removed$TunnelPer, transit_years_removed$Years)
plot(transit2_imp$TunnelPer, transit2_imp$Years)

# Continent vs Year Length
ggplot(transit2_imp, aes(x = Continent, y = Years)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Transit Project Years by Continent",
    x = "Continent",
    y = "Years to Build"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Model Testing with Imputation
```{r}
# removes 894 observations
#full_model <- lm(df_clean$Years ~ ., df_clean)
#summary(full_model)


# Model using predictors assumed to have potential impact
project_years_model <- lm(df_clean$Years ~ df_clean$RR. + df_clean$Length + df_clean$TunnelPer + df_clean$Elevated + df_clean$Atgrade + df_clean$Stations + df_clean$Platform.Length...Meters. + df_clean$urban_pop + df_clean$gdp + df_clean$real_cost)
summary(project_years_model)

project_years_model_log <- lm(log(df_clean$Years) ~ df_clean$RR. + df_clean$Length + df_clean$TunnelPer + df_clean$Elevated + df_clean$Atgrade + df_clean$Stations + df_clean$Platform.Length...Meters. + df_clean$urban_pop + df_clean$gdp + df_clean$real_cost)
summary(project_years_model_log)

# Models of all possible predictors
# Log Test
# years_full_log <- lm(data=df_clean, log(Years) ~ Stations + RR. + Length + TunnelPer + Elevated + Atgrade + Stations + Platform.Length...Meters. + urban_pop + gdp + real_cost)
# summary(years_full_log)
# plot(years_full_log)

# Best r-squared found with sqrt
years_full_sqrt <- lm(data=df_clean, sqrt(Years) ~ Stations + RR. + Length + TunnelPer + Elevated + Atgrade + Stations + Platform.Length...Meters. + urban_pop + gdp + real_cost)
summary(years_full_sqrt)
plot(years_full_sqrt)

# years_full_reg <- lm(data=df_clean, (Years) ~ Stations + RR. + Length + TunnelPer + Elevated + Atgrade + Stations + Platform.Length...Meters. + urban_pop + gdp + log_real_cost)
# summary(years_full_reg)
# # qq plot is skewed
# plot(years_full_reg)

plot(years_full_sqrt)

# step-wise
backstep_model <- step(years_full_sqrt, direction = "both")
summary(backstep_model)

# subset
regfit <- regsubsets(Years ~ ., data = df_clean, nvmax = 10)
subset_years <- summary(regfit)
subset_years
subset_years$bic
# Lowest BIC is model 6
subset_years$cp
# Lowst CP is model 9, but smaller changes from 6 on to 10

```

# Model Testing without imputation
```{r}
# full_model <- lm(transit_years_removed$Years ~ ., transit_years_removed)
# summary(full_model)

# Model using predictors assumed to have potential impact
project_years_model <- lm(transit_years_removed$Years ~ transit_years_removed$RR. + transit_years_removed$Length + transit_years_removed$TunnelPer + transit_years_removed$Elevated + transit_years_removed$Atgrade + transit_years_removed$Stations + transit_years_removed$Platform.Length...Meters. + transit_years_removed$urban_pop + transit_years_removed$gdp + transit_years_removed$real_cost)
summary(project_years_model)

project_years_model_log <- lm(log(transit_years_removed$Years) ~ transit_years_removed$RR. + transit_years_removed$Length + transit_years_removed$TunnelPer + transit_years_removed$Elevated + transit_years_removed$Atgrade + transit_years_removed$Stations + transit_years_removed$Platform.Length...Meters. + transit_years_removed$urban_pop + transit_years_removed$gdp + transit_years_removed$real_cost)
summary(project_years_model_log)

df2_clean <- na.omit(transit_years_removed)
project_years_model_sqrt <- lm(sqrt(df2_clean$Years) ~ df2_clean$RR. + df2_clean$Length + df2_clean$TunnelPer + df2_clean$Elevated + df2_clean$Atgrade + df2_clean$Stations + df2_clean$Platform.Length...Meters. + df2_clean$urban_pop + df2_clean$gdp + df2_clean$real_cost)
summary(project_years_model_sqrt)

plot(project_years_model_sqrt)
step_model_no_imp <- step(project_years_model_sqrt, direction = "both")
summary(step_model_no_imp)
```
